note: A single question centred, full-canvas, symmetric — eyebrow on the upper third, progress dashes on the lower third. Each phrase clears to opacity 0 before the next (kinetic-replace).
html:
<style>
.s7-gnd{position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(90% 70% at 50% 42%,rgba(255,242,0,0.05),transparent 70%),var(--surface,#F1F3F2);}
.s7-scene{position:absolute;inset:0;font-family:var(--font-display-en),"Libre Franklin",sans-serif;color:var(--text,#2B2D2C);}
.s7-act{position:absolute;inset:0;}
/* mirrored side rules framing the centered stage (symmetry / fills width) */
.s7-vl{position:absolute;top:214px;height:552px;width:3px;background:var(--rule,rgba(43,45,44,.22));transform-origin:center top;transform:scaleY(0);}
/* wide flanked-rule eyebrow, centered */
.s7-eyewrap{position:absolute;left:260px;top:150px;width:1400px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:30px;opacity:0;}
.s7-eyeline{flex:1;height:2px;background:var(--rule,rgba(43,45,44,.22));}
.s7-eyelbl{font-family:var(--font-mono),"IBM Plex Mono",monospace;font-weight:600;font-size:22px;letter-spacing:0.34em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--text-mute,#6B6D68);white-space:nowrap;}
/* centered hero + swapping questions (same region) */
.s7-hero{position:absolute;left:0;top:250px;width:1920px;text-align:center;font-weight:900;font-size:420px;line-height:0.82;letter-spacing:-0.04em;color:var(--text,#2B2D2C);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;opacity:0;transform-origin:center 58%;}
.s7-cphr{position:absolute;left:0;top:372px;width:1920px;text-align:center;font-weight:900;font-size:150px;line-height:0.98;letter-spacing:-0.02em;color:var(--text,#2B2D2C);opacity:0;transform-origin:center center;white-space:nowrap;}
/* highlighter marker (theme signature) */
.s7-hw{position:relative;display:inline-block;}
.s7-hb{position:absolute;left:-0.06em;right:-0.06em;top:0.13em;bottom:0.14em;background:var(--accent,#FFF200);transform-origin:left center;transform:scaleX(0);z-index:0;}
.s7-ht{position:relative;z-index:1;color:var(--accent-ink,#14140f);}
/* symmetric 7-tick progress pager, centered along the lower width */
.s7-pager{position:absolute;left:660px;top:772px;width:600px;display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;gap:22px;opacity:0;}
.s7-tick{position:relative;width:52px;height:9px;}
.s7-tkb{position:absolute;inset:0;background:var(--surface-3,#DCDFDC);}
.s7-tkf{position:absolute;inset:0;background:var(--accent,#FFF200);transform-origin:left center;transform:scaleX(0);}
/* centered payoff */
.s7-p1{position:absolute;left:0;top:302px;width:1920px;text-align:center;font-family:var(--font-body),"Inter",sans-serif;font-weight:600;font-size:34px;letter-spacing:0.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--text-2,#4C4E4D);opacity:0;}
.s7-p2{position:absolute;left:0;top:372px;width:1920px;text-align:center;font-weight:900;font-size:162px;line-height:0.96;letter-spacing:-0.022em;color:var(--text,#2B2D2C);opacity:0;}
</style>

Seven questions
7
Who owns it?
Who profits?
Who decides?
Who answers?
Who's liable?
Who's watching?
Who's next?
Seven questions.
One answer.
